assertions.description: The container-name property accepts an ident value.
@container --foo { } parses without requiring a parenthesised query.
An element with container-name set but no container-type can satisfy a name-only @container.
assertions.test: (()=>{const c=document.createElement('div');c.style.containerName='--foo';const x=document.createElement('span');c.appendChild(x);document.body.appendChild(c);const s=document.createElement('style');s.textContent='@container --foo { span { outline: 2px solid red } }';document.head.appendChild(s);const ok=getComputedStyle(x).outlineColor!==''; c.remove();s.remove();return ok;})()

assertions.description: Legacy named query with size still parses (backward compatibility).
container-type continues to accept size and inline-size values for size queries.
